description: A plain candid operational photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) taken at night in a snowy residential neighborhood, apparently documenting 'Operation Parris' enforcement activity in Minnesota referenced in the tweet. In the foreground a federal agent stands with his back to the camera, wearing a dark tactical helmet/beanie and a tan/olive tactical vest with a patch reading 'ERO' (ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations). Snow is piled along a driveway. A dark SUV with a license plate digitally blurred sits in the drive next to gray and blue rolling trash bins; a tan single-story house with a two-car garage is at center, and another officer (also marked 'POLICE') approaches the side door. Bare winter trees and overcast dark sky fill the background, with neighboring houses visible. The image is a documentary news-style photo of an early-morning home arrest/visit, not a designed meme or poster.
